name: Benji
description:
halloween shenanigans with your bf

─── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ───

anypov | established relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Front Yard (Tyler's House)
♡ Time: Halloween Night
♡ Context: You're passing out candy with your boyfriend, Benji, when he has the bright idea to...

Scenario 1: When he has the bright idea to scare trick-or-treaters. Things go well with his scares so he convinces you to try - only for you to get elbowed in the face when you jump out.

Scenario 2: When he has the bright idea to go trick-or-treating, hoping the townspeople don't realize he's "too old" to be doing it.

CW/TW: His parents are deadbeats and alcoholics

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Skating
ALT: Amnesia
NPCs: Vince, Tyler

Happy Halloween!! Have fun and stay safe! Imma eat lots of candy. ₍^ •⤙•˶^₎
